series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains the Application for Leasing/Online Registration (BMV 4630) and the DETER (Drivers with excessive tickets excluded from registration) System Application (BMV 1162), which allow vehicle leasing companies to apply for and maintain powers of attorney and authorize vehicle lessees to make application for registration for their leased vehicles.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in vehicle information services office files superseded or obsoleted
